title: Dragon Head Drop│龍首掉落
description: The Ender Dragon will drop its head when it is killed.│末影龍被擊殺之後會掉落龍首。
body:
⚠️ This data pack requires the data pack [Ender Dragon Loot](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ender-dragon-loot).│該資料包需要資料包[末影龍戰利品](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ender-dragon-loot)。 ⚠️
# Function│功能
After the ender dragon dies, it will drop a dragon head on the bedrock pillar in the center of the exit portal.│末影龍死亡之後，會在返回傳送門中心的基岩柱子上掉落一個龍首。
